Interview Preparation - Thank You and Follow-up Communication
Revise how to write thank you and follow-up messages after interviews

message: Let's revise how to write a thank you and follow-up message after an interview.

button_text: Continue!

message: See this hint image to refresh your memory. ☝️

message: Great! Now answer some questions using the hint image.

button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct thank you message after an interview

1.Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the operations manager role. I look forward to your update.
2.Thanks for calling me for the interview. Hope you pick me.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct follow-up message after an interview

1.When will you let me know if I got the job?
2.Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the content writer role. I look forward to hearing about the next steps.

Correct answer: 2
Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the finance analyst role. I look forward to your feedback.

Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the accounts manager role. I look forward to your decision.
Thank you for the opportunity to interview for the public relations officer role. I look forward to the next steps.
